Data Processing Addendum – Desert Crescent Securities Co. (JSC), CR 101-77-88888 (fictional), VAT 312345678900123 (fictional)
Contact: Mr. Hatim Al-Najjar, Data Protection Officer, dpo@desert-crescent.sa, +966-11-555-0123 (fictional)
Scope: processing of investor onboarding, issuer relations, and CMA disclosure workflows under PDPL and related CMA market-conduct requirements
Direct identifiers processed (lawful basis: contractual compliance/AML): Iqama/National ID 2099-1234-5678 (invalid check digit, sample), Passport KSA-PX7788991 (fictional), and CR copies for corporate signatories
Company identifiers: Client CR 205-44-123456 (fictional) and ZATCA VAT 311223344556677 (fictional) for billing and audit
Payment channel (masked): IBAN SA03 8000 0000 0000 0000 1234 (fictional), billing email accounts@falconsandtraders.sa (fictional affiliate)
Processing instructions: MNPI from issuer working groups (e.g., draft prospectus numbers, non-public board minutes) is segregated; insider lists maintained and trading blackouts enforced per CMA rules
International transfers: no cross-border transfer unless PDPL Art. 29 conditions met and SDAIA guidance followed; where used, KSA-approved clauses and transfer impact assessment logged in T-Audit/1445 registry
Retention: KYC and issuer files retained 10 years after account closure or transaction completion, then securely destroyed unless CMA/anti-fraud holds apply; periodic minimization reviews quarterly
Data subject rights (PDPL): access, correction, deletion, and portability requests may be submitted at privacy.desert-crescent.sa or dsar@desert-crescent.sa; verification requires matching CR/Iqama and registered phone
Address for notices: Desert Crescent Tower, King Fahd Rd., Al Olaya, Riyadh 12212, KSA; mailroom reference DC-RYD-PO-009 (fictional)
Security: role-based access, data-at-rest encryption, and issuer-room watermarking; processors must notify within 24h of a suspected breach affecting MNPI or PDPL-regulated data
Generic form elements (not accepted for DSAR verification): Name: __________, Position: __________, Phone: 800-123-0000 (public helpline), “Compliance Officer” without personal verification
Subprocessor list (summary): Najah Cloud KSA (CR 101-55-000321, Riyadh DC only), Oasis Archive LLC (CR 101-66-000654, Jeddah); no offshore analytics without SDAIA-approved derogation
